use_cases: Adds animated grain texture overlay to hero sections for visual depth
Creates film-like noise effect for dark-themed landing pages
Provides subtle texture layer for branding and marketing sites
Enhances visual appeal of photography or portfolio backgrounds
Adds cinematic grain effect to video landing pages or media sites
ai_summary: A canvas-based animated noise and grain overlay component that generates grayscale noise patterns with adjustable alpha transparency and refresh rate. The effect covers the entire viewport and animates continuously using requestAnimationFrame. Primarily used as a decorative background layer to add texture and visual depth to websites without requiring external dependencies.
